description_long: This object is an elongated, wedge-shaped stone with a smooth, slightly curved surface and rounded edges. Its coloration is primarily a pale beige with subtle brownish patches and some visible surface marks, suggesting natural weathering. The stone appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or artificial modifications except for some faint, hand-written markings on one side. The overall form tapers to a blunt point at one end, while the opposite end is broader and more squared off. The surface texture is matte and slightly rough, with minor abrasions and discolorations that indicate exposure to outdoor elements. This stone could serve as a natural barrier or obstacle in an urban park, garden, or along a pathway.
description: A pale beige, wedge-shaped stone with a smooth, slightly rough surface and rounded edges, showing signs of natural weathering and minor surface markings.
description_view_0: The broad, flat side of the stone is visible, showing faint hand-written markings and a smooth, slightly curved surface.
description_view_1: The stone is seen from its narrowest edge, highlighting its elongated, tapered profile and the rounded, blunt end.
description_view_2: The opposite broad side is shown, with a more uniform beige coloration and a visible natural indentation near the center.
description_view_3: The stone is viewed from the other narrow edge, emphasizing its thickness and the gentle curvature along its length.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Subtle natural mottling and discoloration, with faint hand-written markings on one side; no regular or artificial patterns.
attribute_weathering: Surface is smooth with minor abrasions and discolorations, indicating moderate natural weathering and outdoor exposure.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Typically blends with natural ground surfaces or landscaping elements, but may contrast with paved or manicured urban features.
